entities.name: CROPLAND FALLOWS
entities.description: Land left unseeded for a period of time to recover fertility or due to lack of resources

entities.name: INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: Increasing the productivity of land through improved farming practices

entities.name: EXTENSIFICATION
entities.description: Increasing agricultural production by expanding the area of land under cultivation

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of generating food for human consumption

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL BASKET
entities.description: The variety and quantity of nutrients available in a diet

entities.name: AGRONOMICAL SUITABILITY
entities.description: The fitness of a piece of land for a particular crop based on soil and climate

entities.name: MYANMAR
entities.description: The country where the study on cropland fallows was conducted

entities.name: SHORT-DURATION PULSES
entities.description: Leguminous crops with a short growing cycle used for food and livestock feed

entities.name: LIVESTOCK FEED
entities.description: Food specifically intended for livestock

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: The continent where pulses serve as an important source of livestock feed

entities.name: RICE FALLOWS
entities.description: Land left fallow specifically after the cultivation of rice

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit area of land

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: The financial gain generated from agricultural activities

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers who manage small plots of land

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Materials or substances such as minerals, forests, water, and fertile land that occur in nature

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of the environment through depletion of resources and destruction of ecosystems

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: The use of satellite or aircraft-based sensors to detect and classify land cover

entities.name: DELTA AND COASTAL REGION
entities.description: One of the agro-ecological regions in Myanmar studied for fallow areas

entities.name: DRY ZONE
entities.description: One of the agro-ecological regions in Myanmar studied for fallow areas

entities.name: MODIS
entities.description: Moderate-resolution imaging spectroradiometer used for satellite imaging

entities.name: NDVI
entities.description: Normalized difference vegetation index used to estimate vegetation greenness

entities.name: MVC
entities.description: Maximum value composite used in processing satellite data

entities.name: LSWI
entities.description: Land surface water index used to monitor water content

entities.name: SPECTRAL MATCHING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to derive croplands versus fallows based on spectral signatures

entities.name: MONSOON PERIOD
entities.description: The rainy season between June and October

entities.name: WINTER PERIOD
entities.description: The season between November and February

entities.name: SUMMER PERIOD
entities.description: The season between March and May

entities.name: TOTAL NET CROPLAND AREA
entities.description: The total area of land used for crops in Myanmar

entities.name: PRODUCER'S ACCURACY
entities.description: A measure of the error of omission in land cover classification

entities.name: USER'S ACCURACY
entities.description: A measure of the error of commission in land cover classification

entities.name: MOISTURE
entities.description: The water content in the soil or rainfall available for crop growth
